disableReason.description: The reason why processing has been disabled.

disabled.description: Indicates whether the processing of payments is allowed.

processedFrom.description: The lower bound of the processing tier (i.e., an account holder must have processed at least this amount of money in order to be placed into this tier).

processedTo.description: The upper bound of the processing tier (i.e., an account holder must have processed less than this amount of money in order to be placed into this tier).

tierNumber.description: The processing tier that the account holder occupies.
